posts.author: issisorb (Isabella)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Can we add a phone-app widget option where one can see critical/high priority tasks or a specific task group from the home screen widget? This would streamline my productivity, and I think it is more useful than some of the other options for Monday.com widgets. (Some other widget options being adding a task, recent files, calling team members, etc.)

What are you trying to achieve

I want to suggest this for streamlined productivity. This suggestion makes that possible by ensuring tasks are easily viewable via smartphone.
